description: The Store Manager needs a dashboard to monitor key metrics in LibreOffice Base (chinook.odb). Create a query named 'VIP_Customers' that joins Customer and Invoice tables to show Customer LastName and the sum of Invoice Total (TotalSpent) for customers who have spent more than $40.00, ordered by TotalSpent descending. Create a query named 'Top_Artists' that joins Artist, Album, and Track tables to show Artist Name and the count of TrackId (TrackCount) for artists with more than 50 tracks, ordered by TrackCount descending. Develop a form named 'ManagerDashboard' that uses table controls to display both 'VIP_Customers' and 'Top_Artists' simultaneously. Save the database when finished.
